features_added: Project scaffolding with IWSDK 0.4.1 + Vite + uikitml
Custom 2D pinball physics engine with 6-substep integration
Ball-wall collision (circle-line segment)
Ball-bumper collision (circle-circle with kick physics)
Ball-flipper collision with angular velocity transfer
Gravity on tilted playfield (6.5 degree tilt)
Rolling friction and speed cap
Two flippers with smooth rotation and rest/active angles
3 pop bumpers with distinct colors and kick forces
2 slingshots with triangle geometry
5 drop targets with all-targets bonus
Plunger launch mechanic with hold-to-charge
Drain detection with ball saver system (10s per ball)
Combo multiplier system (up to 10x)
Jackpot system (10 bumper hits charges, flipper triggers)
3 balls per game with scoring and state management
8 PanelUI .uikitml templates (zero HTML DOM)
Head-following HUD (Follower + PivotY) for score/ball/combo/saver
World-space panels for title, game over, pause, leaderboard, settings
Plunger power indicator (head-following)
Message toast system for game events
VR controller support (triggers=flippers, A=launch, B=pause, squeeze=nudge)
Browser keyboard support (A/D=flippers, Space=launch, Esc=pause, Q/E=nudge)
Procedural Web Audio (bumper hit, slingshot, target chime, flipper click, drain, launch, wall bounce, jackpot fanfare, ball saved, combo, game over, ambient drone+pad)
Particle effects (bumper hit sparks, target hit, drain explosion, ball trail)
Bumper flash effects on hit
Holodeck environment (neon grid floor/ceiling, 3 colored table lights, 12 floating wireframe decorations, 40 ambient particles, fog)
3D table geometry (playfield, rails, plunger lane, drain indicator, legs with glow rings, wireframe edges)
Ball glow sphere with speed-responsive intensity
Leaderboard with localStorage persistence (top 10)
Settings panel with volume controls (master/SFX/music)
Table nudge via keyboard or controller squeeze
GitHub repo created and deployed to GitHub Pages

features_completed: Custom 2D pinball physics engine (6 substeps, gravity on tilted plane, friction, speed cap)
Ball-wall collision detection (circle vs line segment, velocity reflection)
Ball-bumper collision (circle-circle, configurable kick force)
Ball-flipper collision with angular velocity transfer from rotating flipper
Two flippers with smooth rotation (rest/active angles, pivot-based)
3 pop bumpers (center magenta, left orange, right green)
2 slingshots (yellow, above flippers)
5 colored drop targets with all-targets-hit bonus (5000 points)
Plunger lane with hold-to-charge launch mechanic
Drain detection and ball loss
Ball saver (10s per new ball)
3 balls per game
Combo multiplier system (1x to 10x, 2s decay timer)
Jackpot system (10 bumper hits charges, flipper hit triggers, escalating value)
Scoring: bumpers 100, slingshots 50, targets 500, flippers 10, all-targets 5000
8 PanelUI .uikitml templates (title, HUD, game over, pause, leaderboard, settings, message, plunger)
Head-following HUD with Follower + PivotY
VR controller input (InputComponent API: Trigger, Squeeze, A_Button, B_Button, Thumbstick)
Browser keyboard input (A/D, arrows, Space, Escape, Q/E)
Procedural Web Audio (12+ distinct SFX + ambient drone)
Particle effects (bumper sparks, target hit, drain explosion, ball trail)
Bumper flash effects
Holodeck environment (grid, lights, wireframe decorations, particles)
3D neon table geometry with rails, legs, glow accents
Ball glow with speed-responsive intensity
Leaderboard (top 10, localStorage)
Settings (master/SFX/music volume)
Table nudge mechanic
Dual runtime (VR + browser)
GitHub repo + GitHub Pages deployment
